# FHIR Queries — RA Population Identification (Treat-to-Target Initiative)

**Strategy:** 10 queries across 3 clinical signals. Use `_include=*:subject` so each bundle returns both the clinical resource *and* the associated Patient, enabling downstream patient-level deduplication.

---

## 🔷 GROUP 1 — RA Diagnoses (4 Queries)

> Covers SNOMED subsumption + explicit subtypes + ICD-10-CM M05/M06 hierarchy. No `clinical-status` filter so **remission** patients are included.

### 1a — SNOMED Subsumption: All RA Descendants
Catches parent RA, seropositive, seronegative, joint-specific, remission — any code that descends from 69896004 in the SNOMED hierarchy. *(Requires server-side subsumption support; recommended as primary query.)*
```
Condition?code:below=http://snomed.info/sct|69896004&_include=Condition:subject
```

### 1b — Explicit SNOMED: Parent, Seropositive, Seronegative
Fallback for servers that do not support `:below`. Covers the three most-documented top-level SNOMED RA concepts.

| Code | Display |
|------|---------|
| `69896004` | Rheumatoid arthritis (disorder) |
| `76652004` | Seropositive rheumatoid arthritis |
| `68878000` | Seronegative rheumatoid arthritis |

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|69896004,http://snomed.info/sct|76652004,http://snomed.info/sct|68878000&_include=Condition:subject
```

### 1c — ICD-10-CM M05.x — Seropositive RA (RF-positive)
Covers M05.0 through M05.9 (Felty's, RA with lung/heart/vasculitis/neuropathy, and unspecified RF+ RA).
```
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M05&_include=Condition:subject
```

### 1d — ICD-10-CM M06.x — Seronegative / Other RA
Covers M06.0 (seronegative), M06.1 (adult-onset Still's), M06.8, M06.9 (RA unspecified).
```
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M06&_include=Condition:subject
```

---

## 🔷 GROUP 2 — DMARD & Biologic Prescriptions (3 Queries)

> `status=active` returns current prescriptions. Change to `status=active,on-hold,completed` to broaden to historical prescriptions if desired.

### 2a — Conventional Synthetic DMARDs (csDMARDs)

| RxNorm CUI | Drug | Common Brand |
|-----------|------|--------------|
| `105585` | Methotrexate | Rheumatrex, Trexall |
| `5521` | Hydroxychloroquine | Plaquenil |
| `9524` | Sulfasalazine | Azulfidine |

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|105585,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|5521,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|9524&status=active&_include=MedicationRequest:subject
```

### 2b — Anti-TNF Biologic DMARDs (bDMARDs)

| RxNorm CUI | Drug | Common Brand |
|-----------|------|--------------|
| `327361` | Adalimumab | Humira |
| `161424` | Infliximab | Remicade |

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|327361,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|161424&status=active&_include=MedicationRequest:subject
```

### 2c — MedicationStatement: All 5 Agents
Catches medications documented by patients or care teams that were never formally prescribed in this system (e.g., specialist-prescribed, patient-reported).
```
MedicationStatement?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|105585,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|5521,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|9524,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|327361,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|161424&status=active&_include=MedicationStatement:subject
```

---

## 🔷 GROUP 3 — Positive Rheumatoid Factor Labs (3 Queries)

> Threshold: **>14 IU/mL** (common upper limit of normal). `status=final` excludes preliminary/amended results. The UCUM unit `[IU]/mL` is the standard representation.

### 3a — Total / Undifferentiated RF (most common clinical order)

| LOINC | Display |
|-------|---------|
| `11572-5` | Rheumatoid factor \[Units/volume\] in Serum |

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|11572-5&value-quantity=gt14|http://unitsofmeasure.org|[IU]/mL&status=final&_include=Observation:subject
```

### 3b — RF IgM Subtype (primary diagnostic antibody for RA)

| LOINC | Display |
|-------|---------|
| `8062-2` | Rheumatoid factor IgM Ab \[Units/volume\] in Serum |

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|8062-2&value-quantity=gt14|http://unitsofmeasure.org|[IU]/mL&status=final&_include=Observation:subject
```

### 3c — RF IgG and RF IgA Subtypes

| LOINC | Display |
|-------|---------|
| `8061-4` | Rheumatoid factor IgG Ab \[Units/volume\] in Serum |
| `8063-0` | Rheumatoid factor IgA Ab \[Units/volume\] in Serum |

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|8061-4,http://loinc.org|8063-0&value-quantity=gt14|http://unitsofmeasure.org|[IU]/mL&status=final&_include=Observation:subject
```

---

## 📋 Reference Summary

| # | Query | Resource | Signal |
|---|-------|----------|--------|
| 1a | SNOMED `:below` 69896004 | Condition | Dx — all RA descendants |
| 1b | SNOMED explicit RA codes | Condition | Dx — top-level subtypes |
| 1c | ICD-10 M05 `:below` | Condition | Dx — seropositive RA |
| 1d | ICD-10 M06 `:below` | Condition | Dx — seronegative/other RA |
| 2a | csDMARDs (MTX, HCQ, SSZ) | MedicationRequest | Rx — active |
| 2b | Anti-TNF (ADA, IFX) | MedicationRequest | Rx — active |
| 2c | All 5 agents | MedicationStatement | Med history |
| 3a | RF total LOINC 11572-5 | Observation | Lab > 14 IU/mL |
| 3b | RF IgM LOINC 8062-2 | Observation | Lab > 14 IU/mL |
| 3c | RF IgG + IgA | Observation | Lab > 14 IU/mL |

---

## ⚠️ Known Limitations for Chart Review Triage

| Signal | Known Non-RA Causes to Exclude |
|--------|-------------------------------|
| **Methotrexate** | Psoriasis, psoriatic arthritis, Crohn's, ectopic pregnancy, cancer |
| **Hydroxychloroquine** | Lupus, malaria prophylaxis |
| **Adalimumab / Infliximab** | Psoriasis, IBD, ankylosing spondylitis |
| **Positive RF** | SLE, Sjögren's, HCV/HBV, endocarditis, advancing age |

The union across all 10 queries provides maximum recall for the screening pool; subsequent chart review against Group 1 (diagnosis) will be the confirmatory step for the quality initiative.

## ⚠️ Caveats, Known False-Positive Sources & Enrichment Guidance

### Query Group 1 (Diagnosis) — Generally highest specificity
| Risk | Detail |
|---|---|
| **ICD-10 incompleteness** | M05 and M06 each contain 100+ site-specific leaf codes (e.g., `M05.711` = seropositive RA, right shoulder). The queries above use the highest-volume "unspecified" and "multiple sites" codes; a production run should use a full VSAC ValueSet (e.g., VSAC OID `2.16.840.1.113883.3.464.1003.113.12.1005`) to capture every leaf code |
| **`clinical-status` filter** | Queries above return all Condition records regardless of status. Add `&clinical-status=active` to restrict to current diagnoses; omit it to include historical/resolved RA (useful for identifying patients who achieved remission) |
| **`:below` server support** | Not all FHIR servers implement the SNOMED subsumption modifier. Test with a known seropositive RA patient before relying on Query 1A; fall back to 1B if it returns zero results unexpectedly |

---

### Query Group 2 (Medications) — Lowest specificity; highest false-positive risk
| Drug | Major Non-RA Uses (false-positive sources) |
|---|---|
| **Methotrexate** | Psoriasis, psoriatic arthritis, Crohn's disease, ectopic pregnancy, oncology (ALL, lymphoma, osteosarcoma) — *very high* non-RA volume |
| **Hydroxychloroquine** | Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), malaria prophylaxis, Sjögren's syndrome |
| **Sulfasalazine** | Inflammatory bowel disease (Crohn's, ulcerative colitis), ankylosing spondylitis |
| **Adalimumab** | Psoriatic arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, IBD, plaque psoriasis, uveitis |
| **Infliximab** | IBD (Crohn's, UC), ankylosing spondylitis, psoriatic arthritis |
| **RxNorm ingredient level** | Some EHR systems store clinical-drug-level codes (e.g., `105588` = methotrexate 2.5 mg oral tablet) rather than ingredient codes. If Query 2A returns unexpectedly few results, verify the medication coding level in your system and supplement with clinical-drug-level RxNorm codes |

> **Mitigation:** Cross-reference medication cohort against Group 1 (diagnosis) results. Patients appearing in Group 2 **only** (no RA diagnosis code) are the highest-priority chart review targets — they may have an RA diagnosis under a different code, or may be a true non-RA use.

---

### Query Group 3 (Rheumatoid Factor) — Moderate specificity; important non-RA conditions
| Condition | RF Positive Rate |
|---|---|
| **Rheumatoid arthritis** | ~70–80% (seropositive RA) |
| **Sjögren's syndrome** | ~75–95% |
| **SLE** | ~25–40% |
| **Mixed connective tissue disease** | ~50–60% |
| **Cryoglobulinemia** | Very high |
| **Chronic infections** (HCV, SBE, TB) | Variable, often low titer |
| **Healthy elderly** (age > 70) | ~5–25% low-titer positivity |
| **Units mismatch** | Some labs report in `U/mL`, `IU/L`, or arbitrary units rather than `[IU]/mL`. If 3A returns fewer results than expected, run a supplemental query without the unit filter (`value-quantity=gt14` only) and inspect the `valueQuantity.unit` field across results |

---

## 🔗 Population Union — Recommended Assembly Logic

```
RA Screening Pool =
    UNION(
        Group1_Patients,   -- Condition: RA diagnosis codes (highest specificity)
        Group2_Patients,   -- MedicationRequest/Statement: DMARD/biologic (low specificity)
        Group3_Patients    -- Observation: RF > 14 IU/mL (moderate specificity)
    )
```

For the **treat-to-target initiative**, prioritize sub-cohorts as follows:

| Priority | Sub-Cohort | Action |
|---|---|---|
| **1 — Confirmed RA** | Group 1 ∩ (Group 2 ∪ Group 3) | Enroll directly — diagnosis + supporting evidence |
| **2 — Likely RA** | Group 1 alone (diagnosis code, no DMARD or RF data) | Verify active disease; check if on watchful waiting |
| **3 — Possible RA** | Group 2 ∩ Group 3 (on DMARD + RF+, no diagnosis code) | Chart review — likely uncoded RA |
| **4 — Needs Review** | Group 2 only or Group 3 only | Chart review — rule out non-RA indication |

1-broad.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries — Rheumatoid Arthritis (All Forms, Excluding Juvenile & Inflammatory Polyarthropathy)

```
Condition?code:below=http://snomed.info/sct|69896004
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M05
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M06.0
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M06.9
```

---

### Query Rationale

| Query | Coverage | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `SNOMED :below 69896004` | All descendants of **Rheumatoid arthritis** in the SNOMED CT hierarchy — including seropositive (76797004), seronegative (239792003), joint-specific variants (shoulder, knee, etc.), and **RA in remission** | Juvenile RA and Inflammatory Polyarthropathy are **separate concept lineages** in SNOMED, so they are **not** descendants of 69896004 and are inherently excluded |

### LOINC Codes Included

| LOINC Code | Description |
|---|---|
| `11572-5` | Rheumatoid factor \[Units/volume\] in Serum |
| `11573-3` | Rheumatoid factor \[Units/volume\] in Serum or Plasma |
| `8061-4` | Rheumatoid factor \[Units/volume\] by Latex agglutination |
| `33690-6` | Rheumatoid factor \[Units/volume\] by Immunoassay |

### Clinical Notes
- **Normal range:** ≤14 IU/mL; values **>14 IU/mL** are considered positive
- **Highly positive RF** (>3× ULN, i.e., >42 IU/mL) has higher specificity for **seropositive RA**
- RF positivity alone is insufficient for RA diagnosis — must be combined with anti-CCP antibodies, clinical symptoms, and other ACR/EULAR criteria
- The UCUM unit `[IU]/mL` (international units per milliliter) is used per FHIR quantity standards

**Breakdown:**

| Component | Value | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| **Resource** | `Observation` | Lab results are stored as Observations in FHIR |

| **Unit (UCUM)** | `[IU]/mL` | International Units per milliliter — standard UCUM representation for RF titer |
| **status** | `final,amended,corrected` | Excludes preliminary/entered-in-error results to ensure lab result integrity |
| **_include** | `Observation:subject` | Pulls associated Patient resources for downstream cohort use |

**Clinical / algorithmic notes:**
- **PheKB context:** In the Harvard eMERGE RA algorithm, a positive RF carries significant positive predictive weight toward seropositive RA classification alongside anti-CCP (LOINC `32218-3`).
- **Threshold:** The 14 IU/mL cutoff (`gt14`) reflects the conventional laboratory upper limit of normal; some labs use slightly different cutoffs (e.g., 20 IU/mL), so value-quantity filtering should be validated against site-specific reference ranges.
- **Seropositive vs. seronegative RA:** This query will capture RF-positive patients who may or may not have clinical RA — pairing with ICD-10 codes (`M05.x` seropositive RA) or anti-CCP positivity is recommended for higher-specificity phenotyping.
- **False positives:** RF can be elevated in Sjögren's syndrome, SLE, chronic infections, and healthy elderly individuals.


---

### Optional Validation Sub-Queries (Per Drug)

To break down the gap by individual DMARD ingredient:

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|6851&status=active&_elements=subject

MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|191831&status=active&_elements=subject
```

---

### Query Logic Reference

| Parameter | Value |
|---|---|
| **DMARD Ingredients (RxNorm)** | `6851` Methotrexate · `5521` Hydroxychloroquine · `9524` Sulfasalazine · `327361` Adalimumab · `191831` Infliximab |
| **RA SNOMED Subtypes** | `69896004` RA (disorder) · `11055151000119108` RA w/ rheumatoid factor · `201766009` RA w/ multisystem involvement · `1073811000119102` RA of hand · `143441000119108` Erosive RA |

### Notes

- **`_include=MedicationRequest:patient`** / **`_include=Condition:patient`** pulls `Patient` resources alongside results so you can match demographics without a second lookup.
